workSections.heading: Google.
workSections.subheading: Designing and evaluating user experiences to engage college-age users with Google products.
workSections.description1: Through Design Consulting at Cornell, I'm leading an 8-person team to develop a three stages mixed method research program on engaging users
workSections.description2: with various Google products. I'm guiding the design, refinement, and testing of conceptual interventions based on findings and stakeholder feedback.
workSections.coverAlt: An iPhone showing the Google Search homepage, alongside decorative iOS apps and their Google counterpart

workSections.heading: frog.
workSections.description1: As a Design Intern at frog, I spent the summer collaborating with a cross-functional team to build Egypt’s first B2C mobile trading platform for grain.
workSections.description2: I mapped out complex trading workflows, partnered with experts, and designed a “wheel-inspired” interface to make market data and transactions accessible for first-time users.
workSections.coverAlt: A mid-fidelity UX prototype showing the spatial scrolling mechanism for trading grain.

workSections.heading: Microsoft.
workSections.subheading: Copilot-powered B2B sales tools designed for Gen Z buyers.
workSections.description1: Through Design Consulting at Cornell, I led a team of 6 consultants during a five-month collaboration with Microsoft.
workSections.description2: We analyzed 50 research papers, conducted 90 interviews, and designed two integrated solutions spanning the B2B buyer journey.
workSections.coverAlt: High-fidelity mockups showing a Copilot-powered match refinement tool for B2B buyers.

workSections.heading: Replit.
workSections.subheading: Fostering polish, revamping design systems, building marketing pages.
workSections.description1: I joined Replit at 15 and loved it so much I stayed for three years, working part-time throughout high school!
workSections.description2: I revamped the RUI design system, polished every surface, designed marketing pages, and helped launch the Following Feed, Bounties, and Blog.
workSections.coverAlt: Landing pages mockups for the Replit AI comparison pages.
